clusters.title: Connect handoff drops audio at cutover (Sonos / iOS 17.4+)
AI DJ interrupts mid-song instead of between tracks

top_epic.title: Eliminate Connect handoff audio drops on Sonos and iOS 17.4+
top_epic.rationale: 3,210 signals — concentrated in Premium users with multi-room speaker setups — point to a SCDP handoff state machine that drops 3-5s of audio when the target device hasn't pre-warmed. Complaint volume jumped 4.1x WoW after iOS 17.4, and the Sonos partner integration triggers the gap ~84% of the time. The audio drop is in the playback layer, not the network, so a protocol bump is required.
top_epic.verdict: Ship-critical — Connect is the strategic moat and the handoff is the moment of truth.
top_epic.recommendation: Bump SCDP to v3.1 with a pre-warm + crossfade buffer, ship a route-change handler fix on iOS, and add handoff success-rate telemetry to the Connect dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: SCDP v3.1 pre-warms the target device 800ms before cutover
Audible gap at handoff <100ms P95 across Sonos / Google / generic Cast
iOS AVAudioSession route-change handler emits no buffer flush at cutover
Connect handoff success-rate dashboard live with per-target-vendor breakdown
